description: Typed reference-dataset library. The verify workflow's external matrix leg looks up a compatible dataset by the manifest's inputs.type. If no entry matches, the external leg is reported N/A (never a failure).

illumina-str-fastq.name: NIST mds2-2157 — Illumina STR (ForenSeq slice, donor NTD01)
illumina-str-fastq.license: research / training / education only (per NIST); not for donor identification or database searching
illumina-str-fastq.notes: First 5,000 reads (351 bp) of a Verogen ForenSeq single-source sample (NTD01). NIST mds2-2157 also includes Promega PowerSeq 46GY and other MPS assays — tool manifests should pair kit-matched reads in the own leg. External leg uses this ForenSeq slice.

ont-bam-hg38.name: 1000 Genomes ONT — hg38 CODIS slice (R10 SUP)
ont-bam-hg38.license: Open access (1000 Genomes / HPRC). Research use. STRhub is not the data provider.
ont-bam-hg38.notes: Pre-built CODIS slices in ont_slices/. Default external test: HG00113.codis.bam (~30 MB). See datasets/ont-bam-hg38/SOURCE.txt.

illumina-bam-hg38.name: Illumina BAM (hg38) — NA12878 (autosomal, mujer)
illumina-bam-hg38.license: Open access (GIAB / NIST). Research and educational use. STRhub is not the data provider.
illumina-bam-hg38.notes: GIAB NA12878/HG001 300x, GRCh38, sliced around 24 autosomal forensic STR loci (CODIS 20 + PentaD + PentaE + D6S1043 + SE33), ±1000bp flanking, ~200-350x per locus. Pick this dataset for autosomal/CODIS tools. Female sample: no Y markers. See datasets/illumina-bam-hg38/SOURCE.txt.

illumina-bam-hg38-y.name: Illumina BAM (hg38) — HG002 (Y-STR, varón)
illumina-bam-hg38-y.license: Open access (GIAB / NIST). Research and educational use. STRhub is not the data provider.
illumina-bam-hg38-y.notes: GIAB HG002 300x, GRCh38, sliced around 15 Y-STR forensic loci (DYS19/385a-b/389I-II/390/391/392/393/438/448/456/458/635 + Y-GATA-H4/A10), ±1000bp flanking, ~96-390x per locus. Pick this dataset for Y-chromosome tools. PENDING: Y leg activation requires dataset-level regions.bed wiring in the harness (see datasets/illumina-bam-hg38-y/regions.bed).
